settings.title: Deep hydration
settings.text: A fine mist that helps skin feel supple without a heavy finish.

settings.title: Refreshes dull skin
settings.text: Revives tired-looking skin with a fresh, dewy appearance.

settings.title: Non-sticky formula
settings.text: Layers comfortably under sunscreen or over makeup.

settings.title: Travel-friendly
settings.text: Made for handbag, desk, gym bag, and in-flight touch-ups.

settings.name: Aloe Vera
settings.description: Soothes and hydrates skin after cleansing or sun exposure.

settings.name: Rose Water
settings.description: Refreshes, tones, and gives the mist its soft botanical feel.

settings.name: Hyaluronic Acid
settings.description: Helps retain moisture for a plump, dewy look.

settings.name: Green Tea Extract
settings.description: Supports the skin barrier with antioxidant care.

settings.name: Ananya S.
settings.text: My skin feels fresh after one spray. I keep it on my work desk and use it before video calls.

settings.name: Meera K.
settings.text: The mist is fine, not sticky, and works beautifully over makeup.

settings.name: Riya P.
settings.text: Lightweight and calming. The Buy 2, Get 1 offer is perfect because I use it daily.

settings.question: Is it suitable for oily skin?
settings.answer: Yes. GlowMist is lightweight, non-sticky, and suitable for oily, dry, combination, and normal skin types.

settings.question: Can I use it over makeup?
settings.answer: Yes. Hold the bottle 8 to 10 inches away and spray lightly to refresh makeup without disturbing the base.

settings.question: How many times can I use it daily?
settings.answer: Use it whenever your skin needs a refresh. Most customers use it 2 to 4 times a day.

settings.question: Is it alcohol-free?
settings.answer: The section content is editable. Connect it to the final product formula once the brand confirms the ingredient list.
